title: austroblechnum jamaicense
intro: Austroblechnum jamaicense, also known as Jamaican chain fern, is a species of fern native to Jamaica. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Austroblechnum jamaicense include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce fever. Austroblechnum jamaicense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice to treat skin conditions and wounds.
